# Decision Tree

**Summary**: A machine learning algorithm used for classification and decision-making based on a set of conditions.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-al-hussain|Al-Hussain, 2014]] implemented decision-tree to develop an AI model for identifying future downhole leaks.

## Key Results and Findings

- The developed model can detect any downhole leak for any well by utilizing both rigless and rig data. ([[2014-al-hussain|Al-Hussain, 2014, p. 13]])
